prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（含物理类）最低位次分别为 37143→43127→18976→56161→49343，波动剧烈。2021-2022 年因本科一批B段（招加试蒙古语文考生）位次偏低；2023 年仅一批A段位次大幅回升至 18976；2024 年新高考物理类下蒙古族专项专业组拉低最低位次至 56161；2025 年回升至 49343，近两年基准位次约 5 万名左右。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 49343、招生计划持平、2024→2025 年位次已明显回升等因素，预计 2026 年竞争略加剧，位次小幅后移。预测最低位次约 49393 名，区间 48893–49893 名。

- 电气工程及其自动化
- 计算机科学与技术
- 机械设计制造及其自动化。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

- 农学
- 会计学
- 经济学
- 临床医学（学制5年）
- 医学影像学（学制5年）
- 药学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 机械电子工程（招蒙古族考生）
- 材料成型及控制工程（招蒙古族考生）
- 化学工程与工艺（招蒙古族考生）
- 土木工程（招蒙古族考生）
- 环境工程（招蒙古族考生）
- 食品科学与工程（招蒙古族考生）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 由于学科评估、专业热度等数据未完整读取，分档主要依据 2025 年各专业录取位次排序。位次在预测区间 48893–49893 名内的考生，建议以二档专业为主、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。注意蒙古族专项专业组位次较低，非蒙古族考生需关注报考资格限制。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science (including Physics Category) were 37143→43127→18976→56161→49343, showing drastic fluctuations. In 2021-2022, due to the undergraduate batch 1 section B (recruiting candidates who took the Mongolian language test), the rankings were relatively low; in 2023, only section A of batch 1 saw a significant rebound to 18976; in 2024, under the new Gaokao Physics Category, the Mongolian ethnic group special major group lowered the minimum ranking to 56161; in 2025, it rebounded to 49343, with the baseline ranking in recent two years around 50,000.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a 211 Project university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 49343, unchanged enrollment plan, and the significant rebound in rankings from 2024 to 2025, it is expected that competition will slightly intensify in 2026, with rankings moving back slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 49393, with a range of 48893–49893.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Science and Technology
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Agronomy
- Accounting
- Economics
- Clinical Medicine (5-year program)
- Medical Imaging (5-year program)
- Pharmacy.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Mechanical and Electronic Engineering (recruiting Mongolian candidates)
- Material Forming and Control Engineering (recruiting Mongolian candidates)
- Chemical Engineering and Technology (recruiting Mongolian candidates)
- Civil Engineering (recruiting Mongolian candidates)
- Environmental Engineering (recruiting Mongolian candidates)
- Food Science and Engineering (recruiting Mongolian candidates).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Due to incomplete data on discipline evaluations and major popularity, the tier classification is mainly based on the 2025 admission rankings of each major. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 48893–49893 are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Note that the Mongolian ethnic group special major group has lower rankings, and non-Mongolian candidates need to pay attention to eligibility restrictions.
